name: Brookfields Indoor Golf & Lounge
address: 1839 S Main St #412, Wake Forest, NC 27587
about: Brookfields Indoor Golf & Lounge is a Wake Forest-based venue offering indoor golf experiences on Full Swing simulators alongside a bar environment. The facility features premium simulators with access to over 130 world-class courses, including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews, along with a driving range and short-game areas that provide real-time feedback. It operates on a walk-in basis without membership requirements, catering to both practice-focused golfers and social groups looking for a relaxed atmosphere with drinks.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing simulators with course variety
Relaxed lounge atmosphere with bar service
No membership required for walk-in play
Suitable for both practice and social events

food_and_drink.notes: No food onsite, but customers can bring their own or order takeout
Full bar with beer, wine, and non-alcoholic options available onsite

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulators mentioned as core technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, but as a golf simulator venue, customers typically bring their own clubs or rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food is served onsite, but customers can bring their own food or order takeout. Alcohol is available at the onsite bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typical indoor simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Brookfields kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to accommodate families with a relaxed atmosphere and activities suitable for various skill levels.
